message:
feat(fnp-python): add conformance_piecewise.rs harness (10 tests)

Tests numpy.piecewise against NumPy oracle covering:
- Basic two-condition piecewise functions
- Three-region piecewise with boundary handling
- Default values for uncovered elements
- Scalar function values vs lambda functions
- Floating-point inputs with abs/sqrt
- Overlapping conditions (first-match-wins semantics)
- 2D array support
- Empty array edge case
- All-false conditions (default branch)
- NaN/Inf handling in conditions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
